key_insight: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved near-perfect performance in \emph{solving} high-school mathematics, their ability to \emph{evaluate} the diverse reasoning processes of real human students remains under-examined.
engineering_relevance: Potential relevance: mathematical reasoning workflows and research evaluation.

paper_title: RealMath-Eval: Why SOTA Judges Struggle with Real Human Reasoning
